word: H7457 - רָעֵב - râʻêb - raw-abe' - Hunger bitten

sections.paragraph:
Original: רעב

Transliteration: râ‛êb

Phonetic: raw-abe'

BDB Definition:

  1. hungry
    1. hungry
    2. hungry man (substantive)
    3. of failing strength (figuratively)

Origin: from H7456

TWOT entry: 2183b

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
